name: Columbus Propst Park
description: Columbus Propst Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Columbus, MS. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Lion Hills Golf Center MS
description: Come play pickleball at Lion Hills Golf Center MS in Columbus, MS! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you will need to set up the net which can be found in the pro shop. Amenities include lights, pro shop, and Lion Hill's restaurant, Mulligan's, located upstairs. The courts are $10.

name: YMCA Columbus Downtown
description: YMCA Columbus Downtown is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Columbus, MS. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.
